ead.archdesc:
======= RMM04674Great composers and musicians collection4674Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
February 20182B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humanThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:52:00 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
Multiple languages
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Great composers and musicians collection 4674
58 items. 58 items.
1780-1910 Autographs, manuscripts, and portraits. Autographs, brief music manuscripts, and/or portraits of famous and lesser-known Western European and American composers and performers, including Beethoven, Berlioz, Brahms, Busoni, Elgar, Gounod, Grieg, Handel, Haydn, Liszt, MacDowell, Mendelssohn, Meyerbeer, Mozart, Paderewski, Paganini, Rossini, Anton Rubinstein, Saint-Saëns, Sarasate, Schubert, Sibelius, Richard Strauss, Tchaikovsky, Toscanini, Verdi, Wagner, Weber, and Hugo Wolf. The bound volume includes autographs, manuscript letters, and/or portraits of composers including Beethoven, Brahms, Chopin, Dvorak, Gounod, Grieg, Francis Scott Key, Leoncavallo, Liszt, Massenet, Mendelssohn, Meyerbeer, Offenbach, Rossini, Saint-Saëns, Schumann, Verdi, and Wagner. Collection material in Italian, German, French, and English. <<<<<<< HEAD 1++ ======= 1++ >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 3952904
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2018
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, February 2018
Date modified:
Margaret Nichols, July 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Autographs, brief music manuscripts, and/or portraits of famous and lesser-known Western European and American composers and performers, including Beethoven, Berlioz, Brahms, Busoni, Elgar, Gounod, Grieg, Handel, Haydn, Liszt, MacDowell, Mendelssohn, Meyerbeer, Mozart, Paderewski, Paganini, Rossini, Anton Rubinstein, Saint-Saëns, Sarasate, Schubert, Sibelius, Richard Strauss, Tchaikovsky, Toscanini, Verdi, Wagner, Weber, and Hugo Wolf.
Cite As:
Great composers and musicians collection, #4674. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
RELATED MATERIALS
Related item: The great composers: a collection of autographs, 1842-1910, #4600 Bd. Ms. 695.
Restrictions on Use:
Researchers may view one folder at a time.
Processing Information
Former call number for at least some items in the collection: Rare E173.N95 pt.13.
Portraits. Autographs (manuscripts). Music -- History and criticism -- 19th century. Music -- History and criticism -- 18th century. Musicians -- Portraits. Musicians. Composers -- Great Britain. Composers -- United States. Composers -- Italy. Composers -- Germany. Composers -- France. Beethoven, Ludwig van, 1770-1827. Berlioz, Hector, 1803-1869. Brahms, Johannes, 1833-1897. Busoni, Ferruccio, 1866-1924. Elgar, Edward, 1857-1934. Gounod, Charles, 1818-1893. Grieg, Edvard, 1843-1907. Handel, George Frideric, 1685-1759. Haydn, Joseph, 1732-1809. Liszt, Franz, 1811-1886. MacDowell, Edward, 1860-1908. Mendelssohn-Bartholdy, Felix, 1809-1847. Meyerbeer, Giacomo, 1791-1864. Mozart, Wolfgang Amadeus, 1756-1791. Paderewski, Ignace Jan, 1860-1941. Paganini, Nicolò, 1782-1840. Rossini, Gioacchino, 1792-1868. Rubinstein, Anton, 1829-1894. Saint-Saëns, Camille, 1835-1921. Sarasate, Pablo de, 1844-1908. Schubert, Franz, 1797-1828. Sibelius, Jean, 1865-1957. Strauss, Richard, 1864-1949. Tchaikovsky, Peter Ilich, 1840-1893. Toscanini, Arturo, 1867-1957. Verdi, Giuseppe, 1813-1901. Wagner, Richard, 1813-1883. Weber, Carl Maria von, 1786-1826. Wolf, Hugo, 1860-1903.
